description: An objection-response follow-up whose body smuggles a prohibited employment/offer guarantee. The mechanical no-prohibited-guarantee scan (which covers EVERY rendered field: subject, body, primaryCTA, each claim, each capability, each personalization statement, each risk flag) blocks it. Highest-stakes case: this is applicant-facing content.

approvedClaims: Our program includes weekly live coaching sessions.

evidenceRecords.content: Applicant is worried the program will not lead to a better job.

output_schema_constraints: the draft body contains a guarantee like 'We guarantee you a job offer within 30 days'
run is policy_blocked at no-prohibited-guarantee; zero artifact rows; nothing is sent
